title: Leo in a Plane
blurb: Hold to fly, collect coins, and avoid obstacles!

help.howToPlay: Hold the button or the screen to fly, and release to descend. Collect coins and avoid obstacles.
help.scoring: Coins and diamonds add points. Hitting an obstacle ends the game.
help.rewards: The farther you fly and the more points you earn, the more coins and diamonds you'll get.
help.tip: Don't fly too high - sometimes it's better to pass beneath an obstacle.
